description: Ninetales and Furret form a great front core in the 'ABB electric' bait team. Furret is used to bait out the opposing grass/Cradily since it naturally loses to Cradily.

sources.author: YasserPoGO

description: A Kingdra + Marowak lead pairing the creator is considering for a Cradily-less team, though he notes it is very weak to Forretress.
